titles.en: Larification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Al-Rayan

text: و ما كان فيه عن عليّ بن الرّيّان فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن عليّ بن الرّيّان‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Al-Rayan has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Ali ibn Al-Rayan.
